Contact

Email support@detectvideo.vip for feedback, deletion questions, provider disclosure requests, unsupported-link reports, or early-access interest. Cloudflare Email Routing for this inbox is still pending owner verification, so intake should be treated as pending until routing is confirmed.

Educational signal, not forensic proof.

Sample report only — this is demo content and not an analysis of your video.

support@detectvideo.vip

Primary public contact address: support@detectvideo.vip. Use this for support, deletion, privacy, bug, unsupported-link, and early-access requests.

Email intake pending verification

Cloudflare Email Routing for support@detectvideo.vip is still pending owner verification. Do not treat the mailbox as fully verified until routing/MX status is confirmed.

Deletion or privacy questions

Include the affected public link or report context only when you have the right to share it. Do not send sensitive media unless a reviewed upload and retention flow is live.

Bug/unsupported-link reports

Send the page URL, browser/device context, and a short description of the issue or early-access request.

Email support

Email support@detectvideo.vip for support, deletion, privacy, unsupported-link, bug, or early-access requests.

Email intake pending verification: Cloudflare Email Routing for support@detectvideo.vip is not yet verified, so delivery should be confirmed by the owner before relying on this inbox for time-sensitive requests.

Message draft helper

This helper does not send messages. Use it to draft your request, then email support@detectvideo.vip directly.

△AI Video Detector

Results are preliminary educational signals, not forensic, legal, or moderation proof. This site is independently operated and is not affiliated with similarly named AI video detector sites or any video platform.

Preview/sample mode is active; automated detection remains disabled until provider validation and compliance review are complete.
